theory.intro: A quadrilateral is a four-sided shape. It is named by its sides and angles: equal sides (tick marks), right angles (small square) and parallel sides (arrows).
facts: **Rectangle**: opposite sides equal and $4$ right angles.
**Rhombus**: $4$ equal sides, opposite sides parallel (no right angles needed).
steps: Check for right angles (small square marks).
Check which sides are equal (tick marks) and which are parallel (arrows).
Match the properties to the most specific name.
